title: On Holding Q3 2023 Earnings Beat Estimates with Record Results
text: On Holding (ONON) reported Q3 2023 earnings of $0.22 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.16 per share compared to earnings of $0.07 per share a year ago. The company achieved a record top line quarter with over CHF 480 million net sales, representing 47% growth year-over-year or 58% on a constant currency basis. Q3 2023 marked the company's seventh consecutive record quarter. On achieved its highest gross profit margin since IPO at 59.9%. Adjusted EBITDA reached CHF 81.3 million, marking another record that exceeded any other quarterly adjusted EBITDA by almost 30%. Net profit in the quarter was CHF 58.7 million, more than the entire year of 2022. Management increased full-year 2023 revenue guidance to CHF 1.79 billion, up from prior outlook of CHF 1.76 billion, implying annual growth of more than 46%.
